instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect shift timeout conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect shift fault when Shift_Duration exceeds Shift_Timeout_Threshold.

expected_output: IF Shift_Duration > Shift_Timeout_Threshold THEN Shift_Timeout_Fault = TRUE
